# Cato Networks Test Fixtures

`centreon-cato-api.mockoon.json` is copied from the mirrored Centreon plugins
repository:

```text
/opt/baddisk/monitoring/repos/centreon/centreon-plugins/tests/network/security/cato/networks/api/cato-api.json
```

The source repository is Apache-2.0 licensed. The fixture provides raw Mockoon
GraphQL responses for `entityLookup`, `accountSnapshot`, `accountMetrics`, and
`eventsFeed`.
